oauth_not_configured.title: Sign-in is unavailable
oauth_not_configured.description: The server does not have OAuth configured. Ask your administrator to set OAUTH_ISSUER, OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, and OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.

oauth_state_invalid.title: Your sign-in session expired
oauth_state_invalid.description: The login link is no longer valid. Please start over.

oidc_error.title: Identity provider error
oidc_error.description: The identity provider rejected the sign-in request or could not be reached. Check the detail below and try again.

user_disabled.title: Account disabled
user_disabled.description: This account has been disabled. Contact your administrator if you believe this is a mistake.

single_user_mode_active.title: OAuth sign-in is disabled
single_user_mode_active.description: The server is configured for single-user mode. Use the username and password form on the sign-in page.

unknown.title: Unexpected error
unknown.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
